name: Whispers in the Forest
short_description: Whispers in the Forest is a single-player base defense strategy game where you must build, upgrade, and defend your base against demonic creatures in a cursed forest. Manage your resources, lead your troops, and survive the darkness of the night as you fight to protect your only hope for salvation.
detailed_description:
Roadmap


About the Game

Whispers in the Forest is a single-player base defense strategy game that combines resource management, unit deployment, and survival mechanics in a cursed forest. As the commander, you must lead your team to build, upgrade, and defend your base against the relentless onslaught of demonic creatures each night.

Key Features:

  • Base Building and Strategic Management:Construct and upgrade walls, towers, and essential structures to fortify your base. Build specialized buildings to enhance resource collection and unlock new abilities for your soldiers. Recruit, deploy, and command troops wisely to defend against escalating threats and ensure survival.

  • Immersive Dynamic Environment:

    Navigate a breathtaking yet perilous cursed forest where the weather, lighting, and time of day shape your survival. Experience ever-changing weather conditions, from gentle rain and eerie fog to violent storms and snowfall, each affecting visibility and strategy. By day, explore and gather resources beyond the safety of your base, but as night falls, brace for relentless waves of demonic creatures with unique abilities. The advanced dynamic lighting system brings the forest to life, casting hauntingly beautiful yet ominous glows from torches, magic lights, and mysterious sources, enhancing both the beauty and danger of the world around you.

Your Mission:

Survive as long as you can in the cursed forest. You can either endure the relentless attacks for 32 days until help arrives or strike back by finding and destroying the heart of the enemy base. The choice is yours.
